titleStmt.title: SII 18.427: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 427. (B.K. No. 41 of 1934-35.) KADARMAṆḌALGI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Garuḍa-pillar set up in front of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1503, Vishu, Āshāḍha ba. 14, corresponding to A.D. 1581 June 29, Thursday (not verifiable).

It records the grant of the village Kaduraviṇḍalige (modern Kadarmaṇḍalgi) for the worship of the god Hanumantasvāmin on the occasion of Karkāṭaka-saṁkrānti. This Saṁkrānti occurred on the following Friday. The grant was given by Keṁgappa-Nāyaka, son of Hanuma-Nāyaka of Saṁtheya Bennur. The village granted was situated in Ṟaṭṭehaḷḷi Nūruṁbāḍa, which was a sub-division of Chandragutti-vēṇṭhe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu namastuṁgaṣiraścuṁbhica
ṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē harērlīlāvavāRead rā*hasya
daniReaddaṇṣṭrāṣrādaṁḍaḥsa pātu vaḥ hēmādrikalaśō ya
tra dhātrīchatraśriyaṁ dadhau . svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya
śālivāhanaśakhavaruṣa 1503 neya viśusaṁ
vatsarada Āśāḍha ba 14 lū śrīmattu kadurauṁ
ḍaḷige hanumaṁttasvāmige saṁttebeṁnūra cikka ha
numanāyakara makkaḷu keṁgappenāyakaru karkāṭaka
saṁkrāṁttipuṁṇyakāladalu caṁdraguttivēṁṭheya
ke saluva ṟaṭṭehaḷḷi nūṟuṁbāḍada voḷagaṇa ṟaṭa
haḷiya sīmege saluva beṁnūra staḷada voḷagaṇa
kaduramiṁḍalige grāmavanū Amṛtapaḍi naṁdādīpa
ti Aṁgaraṁgavayibhavake karkaṭaka saṁkrāṁti puṁṇya
kāladalli hanumaṁttasvāmige saṁtheya beṁnūra cika
hanumināyakara makaḷū keṁgappanāyakarū sahi
raṁṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭevāgi Ā grā
make saluva gruhārāma kṣētra nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśā
ṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhō
ga tējasvāṁmya Ēnuṁṭāda tējōpārjanēnu ha
numaṁttadēvara Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīpati Aṁgaraṁ
gavayibhavakke Acaṁdrārkkastāyi Āgi sukhadiṁ na
ḍiyabēkeṁdu saṁtheyabeṁnūra cika hanumana
yakara makaḷu keṁgappanāyakarū koṭṭa kaduraviṁḍa
ḷige grāmada dharmaśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 18.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
